title: Simple Plates
description: Easy, satisfying meals I make again and again—good for breakfast, lunch, or dinner. Most are one-pan dishes built around a protein and a vegetable, simply seasoned to let the flavor of the food come through.

title: Sides
description: Simple sides with flavor combinations I enjoy. Good alongside a meal or as a starting point.

title: Salads
description: There are lots of salad recipes in the world. I think salads are best made to your taste. These are a few I like.

title: Breakfast & Sweets
description: I like a little something sweet. Simple, thoughtful combinations that come together easily.

title: Broths & Soups
description: Simple broths and soups I come back to. Warm, a little interesting, and easy to make.
